personal.content:
Today is Sankranthi festival.
Let's keep it normal..........
Telugulo matladatha. eeroju nenem anukunna antey, oka goal pettukovali and aa goal mmedhaney focus cheyyali. aa goal kuda naku nachali.... and istapadali appuduey chinna chinna progressulu kooda nannu manchiga feel ayyetu cheathay. anthey kadhu nannu reality lo vedetattu naku chupisthundhi , i am very eager to try hard and acheive my goal . na goal entantey , nenu ekkuva android architecture meedha focus chesi skills nerchukoni naku nachey job or role oka mobile company lo job kottali and that should be satisful ga vundali
dhani tharvatha job vachaka jessie tho matladali aaroju ni gurinchi ila feel ayyanu ani mohamatam lekunda , meaningful matladali.
ila raskuntu pothuntey......... annni cheyyalaney anipisthundhi kani vatini try cheathamo ledho kuda thelidhu ,  but for sure i am goona try and do it .
